prompt: A richly detailed steampunk-inspired vintage video platform homepage shown as a full-screen web interface mockup in dark brass, aged bronze, black iron, and sepia tones, designed like a Victorian industrial machine with ornate filigree, pipes, rivets, gears, gauges, and glowing Edison bulbs built into the frame. The top left shows a modern overlay logo reading Pollo AI and GPT Image 2. Centered across the top is a large engraved metal site title, {argument name="site name" default="ElectroVid"}, with a smaller plaque subtitle reading {argument name="tagline text" default="THE FUTURE IN MOTION"}. A navigation bar directly beneath contains 6 visible items: a home icon button, TRENDING, INNOVATIONS, DOCUMENTARIES, ENTERTAINMENT, and a search box on the right with placeholder text similar to Search ElectroVid.... On the upper right corner of the frame there is 1 round analog clock gauge. On the left sidebar, a framed section titled Popular Channels contains exactly 3 channel cards stacked vertically, each with a circular emblem, subscriber count, and a SUBSCRIBE button: The Patent Office with 27.4K subscribers, The Royal Society with 18.7K subscribers, and General Electric with 35.1K subscribers. The main content area features 1 large central video player with a sepia historical scene of two men in suits debating in front of a chalkboard marked AC vs. DC with lightning-like chalk effects; one man points while the other gestures with open hands, and a glowing light bulb plus early electrical apparatus sit on the table between them. Add a realistic video player UI with a play button, timeline with partial red progress, volume icon, elapsed and total time reading 08:47 / 22:31, settings icon, theater icon, and fullscreen icon. Beneath the player, show the featured video title as {argument name="featured video title" default="The Truth About AC vs. DC: The Final Debate"}, with channel metadata below: The Electrical Age, 142K views, 3 days ago, plus a small circular profile portrait and a brass LIKE button showing 5.8K. Below that, a section header reading LATEST VIDEOS contains exactly 3 thumbnail cards in one row: 1) My New Incandescent Bulb, showing a man holding a lit bulb, duration 10:12, channel Thomas Edison, 89K views, 5 days ago; 2) The Wonders of the Wardenclyffe Tower, showing a Tesla tower under electrical arcs, duration 15:36, channel Nikola Tesla, 120K views, 1 week ago; 3) The Automobile Revolution, showing an early vintage car with a driver on a city street, duration 12:08, channel Henry Ford, 110K views, 1 week ago. Centered below the thumbnails is a brass button reading VIEW ALL VIDEOS. At the bottom center, add a footer plaque reading © 1893 ElectroVid, Ltd. All rights reserved. Decorate the outer border with additional pipes, cogs, mechanical joints, embossed corners, and 1 more circular pressure gauge near the bottom right. Use symmetrical, highly polished antique UI design, cinematic warm lighting, realistic texture, impeccable serif typography, dense ornamental craftsmanship, and a believable fusion of modern streaming layout with 19th-century industrial aesthetics.
translatedPrompt: 一张细节丰富的蒸汽朋克风格复古视频平台主页，呈现为全屏网页界面模型，采用暗黄铜、陈旧青铜、黑铁和棕褐色调，设计灵感源自维多利亚时代的工业机器，框架中融入了华丽的镂空花纹、管道、铆钉、齿轮、仪表盘和发光的爱迪生灯泡。左上角显示一个现代叠加标志，文字为 Pollo AI 和 GPT Image 2。顶部中央是一个巨大的金属雕刻网站标题 {argument name="site name" default="ElectroVid"}，下方配有一块较小的副标题铭牌，文字为 {argument name="tagline text" default="THE FUTURE IN MOTION"}。正下方的导航栏包含 6 个可见项目：一个主页图标按钮、TRENDING（热门）、INNOVATIONS（创新）、DOCUMENTARIES（纪录片）、ENTERTAINMENT（娱乐），以及右侧带有占位符文本（类似于 Search ElectroVid...）的搜索框。框架右上角有一个圆形模拟时钟仪表。左侧边栏中，一个标题为 Popular Channels（热门频道）的框架区域垂直堆叠了 3 张频道卡片，每张卡片均带有圆形徽标、订阅者数量和一个 SUBSCRIBE（订阅）按钮：The Patent Office（27.4K 订阅者）、The Royal Society（18.7K 订阅者）以及 General Electric（35.1K 订阅者）。主要内容区域设有一个大型中央视频播放器，画面为棕褐色的历史场景，两名身着西装的男子在写有“AC vs. DC”的黑板前辩论，黑板上有类似闪电的粉笔特效；一人在指点，另一人摊开双手示意，桌上放着一个发光的灯泡和早期的电气设备。添加一个逼真的视频播放器 UI，包含播放按钮、带有部分红色进度条的时间轴、音量图标、显示为 08:47 / 22:31 的已播放和总时长读数、设置图标、剧场模式图标和全屏图标。播放器下方显示精选视频标题 {argument name="featured video title" default="The Truth About AC vs. DC: The Final Debate"}，下方是频道元数据：The Electrical Age，142K 次观看，3 天前，以及一个圆形个人资料头像和一个显示 5.8K 的黄铜色 LIKE（点赞）按钮。下方是一个标题为 LATEST VIDEOS（最新视频）的区域，包含一行 3 张缩略图卡片：1) My New Incandescent Bulb，展示一名男子手持发光灯泡，时长 10:12，频道 Thomas Edison，89K 次观看，5 天前；2) The Wonders of the Wardenclyffe Tower，展示处于电弧下的特斯拉塔，时长 15:36，频道 Nikola Tesla，120K 次观看，1 周前；3) The Automobile Revolution，展示一辆行驶在城市街道上的早期复古汽车，驾驶员在车内，时长 12:08，频道 Henry Ford，110K 次观看，1 周前。缩略图下方居中处是一个写有 VIEW ALL VIDEOS（查看所有视频）的黄铜按钮。底部中央添加一块铭牌，写着 © 1893 ElectroVid, Ltd. All rights reserved.。外边框装饰有额外的管道、齿轮、机械连接件、浮雕边角，右下角附近还有一个圆形压力表。采用对称、高度抛光的复古 UI 设计，电影级暖光，逼真的纹理，无可挑剔的衬线字体，密集的装饰工艺，以及现代流媒体布局与 19 世纪工业美学的完美融合。

breakdown.creativeCore: Steampunk ElectroVid 主页：此提示词可生成华丽的维多利亚工业风格流媒体网站模型，非常适合用于复古未来主义 UI 概念设计、海报，或关于改进文本渲染的社交媒体视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
